col.title: Title
status.allFailed: All {count} properties failed to load — check your connection or reconnect.
settings.credentialsInvalid: Found, but invalid — needs a Desktop OAuth client with client_id/client_secret.
settings.searchReconnect: Reconnect to fill in the Search Console columns.
settings.psiKeyOptional: Optional — only needed for the Performance tab.
status.needAuth: A Google account connection is required.
insights.notConfigured: Set your PageSpeed API key in Settings to start.
insights.empty: No measurements yet. Press “Measure now” to start.
repos.notConfigured: Set githubToken + githubRepos in ~/.sitedeck/config.json to start.
repos.empty: No data yet. Press “Measure now” to start.
settings.updateAvailable: Update available ({version}). It installs on restart.
settings.description: A local dashboard summarizing key GA4 metrics and PageSpeed scores across your sites.
error.credentials_not_found: OAuth credentials not found: {detail}. Place credentials.json in ~/.sitedeck/.
tip.aiTraffic: AI assistant referrals — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot…
tip.searchPosition: Search Console average position — lower is better
tip.title: Has a non-empty <title>
tip.structuredData: Has JSON-LD structured data (rich results + AI engines)
strategy.title: Improvement strategy
strategy.deltaDrop: Active users dropped {pct}% vs. the previous period — check recent changes or ended campaigns
strategy.trendDown: Daily trend is declining — review content freshness and acquisition channels
strategy.aiShareLow: Low AI-referred share ({pct}%) — strengthen GEO with llms.txt and structured data
strategy.ctrLow: Low click-through vs. impressions ({pct}%) — improve titles and meta descriptions
strategy.channelConcentrated: Traffic concentrated in '{name}' ({pct}%) — diversify acquisition channels
strategy.positionWeak: Average search position {pos} — strengthen internal links and content
strategy.conversionLow: Few key events per session ({pct}%) — review CTAs and the conversion funnel
strategy.allGood: Core metrics look healthy — no warnings
